content.heading: Core Attributes
content.text: Your character has several core stats that determine combat effectiveness and survivability.

content.description: Your life force. Reaches 0 = death. Regenerates slowly when out of combat.
Energy for casting spells. Regenerates over time.
Used for sprinting, dodging, and some abilities. Regenerates quickly.

content.heading: Damage Types
content.text:
Physical - Weapon attacks, reduced by armor
Magical - Spell damage, reduced by magic resistance
True - Ignores all defenses

content.heading: Combo System
content.text: Chain attacks for increased damage. Each consecutive hit within 2 seconds increases damage by 10%, up to 50% bonus.

content.heading: Critical Hits
content.text: Chance to deal 2x damage. Base crit chance: 5% + Agility/20

content.heading: Block & Parry
content.text:
Blocking reduces damage by 50-75% depending on shield.
Perfect Parry (block at last moment): negates damage and stuns attacker for 1s.

content.heading: Experience Gain
content.text:
Defeating Enemies: 10-500 XP depending on level
Quests: 50-1000 XP
Exploration: 25 XP per location discovered
Crafting: 5 XP per item created

content.heading: Level Up
content.text:
Required XP = 100 × Level²
Benefits:
• +10 HP
• +5 Mana
• +1 Skill Point
• +2 Attribute Points

content.heading: Attribute Points
content.text:
Strength: +2 melee damage, +1 HP
Agility: +1% crit chance, +0.5% dodge
Intelligence: +3 mana, +2 spell damage
Endurance: +5 HP, +3 stamina

content.heading: Equipment Slots
content.text:
Weapon (Main Hand)
Shield/Off-hand
Helmet
Chest Armor
Gloves
Legs
Boots
2x Ring
1x Amulet

content.heading: Rarity Tiers
content.text:
Common (Gray): Basic stats
Uncommon (Green): +1 bonus stat
Rare (Blue): +2 bonus stats
Epic (Purple): +3 bonus stats + special effect
Legendary (Orange): +5 bonus stats + powerful effect

content.heading: Durability
content.text: Equipment degrades with use. Repair at blacksmith or use repair kits.

content.heading: Professions
content.text:
Blacksmithing: Craft weapons and armor
Alchemy: Create potions and elixirs
Enchanting: Add magical properties to items

content.heading: Gathering Resources
content.text:
Mine ore from rocks
Harvest herbs from plants
Skin animals for leather
Salvage old equipment for materials

content.heading: Crafting Process
content.text:
1. Learn recipe (found or purchased)
2. Gather required materials
3. Use crafting station
4. Success rate based on skill level

content.heading: Death Penalty
content.text:
On death:
• Drop 10% of carried gold
• Lose equipped items durability (-10%)
• -5% XP for current level (can't de-level)

content.heading: Respawn
content.text:
Respawn at last visited checkpoint or town.
Corpse remains for 10 minutes to retrieve lost gold.
